desc: Attack single enemy target and cause 200% to 1000% physical damage. Cause 1000% damage to the target whose HP is lower than 30%
name: Shark on Tooth

desc: Swordman attacks the target twice in a blink with superb Sword Arts. Damage will increase with Skill Level.
name: Double Attack

desc: Attack one row of enemy and cause 200%, 400% and 600% physical damage to the target separately.And there is a chance to restore 50 point fury of your own at the end of the round
name: Cut. Autumn Rain

desc: Store the energy for one round to raise attack. The effect and skill duration increase with Skill Level.
name: Strike

desc: Place battle spear mark to all enemy targets. 100% damage received by the marked target will be transferred to the caster's HP recovery. The effect will last for 2 rounds.
name: ☆.  Battle Spear

desc: Deals 150% physical damage, reduces enemy's physical and magical attack by 25% for one round.increases with Skill Level.
name: Gale

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 200% magical damage. There is a chance to paralyze the target (cannot use the normal attack) for 1 round.It's unavoidable and can cause critical hit
name: Judgment of God

desc: Deals 100% physical damage, 30% chance to stun the enemy for one round.
name: Moonlight

desc: Clear debuff of all your members, and restore the maximum HP by 30%. Meanwhile, there is a chance to make each of the target stun for 1 round. HP increases with the crew  constitution; stun rate increases with the crew wit
name: U. Dizzy Dance

desc: Reduce attack of all enemies. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Brutal Clash

desc: Release sandstorm to the target and cause 200% magical damage. Then the damage will randomly leap to 5 times with 20% decrease each time. For the damaged target, there's a certain odds of being stunned for 1 round
name: Ground Death

desc: Raise physical attack of all members of your side. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Cheer

desc: Attack current target and all enemies on a row and a line of that target and cause 240% magical damage and silence the target for 2 rounds
name: Smoke Launcher

desc: Swordman slashes the enemy with the sword three times at a meteor speed. Damage increases with Skill Level.
name: Meteor Strike

desc: Attack one row of enemy and cause 200% physical damage and strength *10 points extra damage. Meanwhile, absorb 50% damage point into your HP
name: Spar Break

desc: Attack one row of enemy and cause 200% physical damage, and stun the target for 1 round
name: Super Spinning Darts

desc: Attack all enemies and cause 100% magical damage, having a chance to cause one of the flowing debuff to your target: stun, burn,slumber and freeze. The effect will last for 1 round
name: Surprise Balls

desc: Attack current target and all enemies on a row and a line of that target and cause 200% physical damage. And burn the target for 2 rounds
name: Flame Gun

desc: Attack a single target and cause 200% physical damage and strength *10 extra damage. Meanwhile， reduce 50% of the target's physical and magical defence for 2 rounds, and stun the target for 1 round
name: Man-Demon Smite

desc: Attack a single target and cause 300% physical damage and strength *10 extra damage. And absorbs his/her fury up to 50 points after the target is hit.
name: Giant Sword of Iron

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 120% magical damage with a chance to silence and poison the target for 2 rounds
name: Poison Swamp Burger

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 120% magical damage. Meanwhile, there is a chance to reduce 50% speed and 30% hit rate of the target. The effect will last for 2 rounds
name: Smooth Impact

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 200% magical damage. And poison the target for 2 rounds
name: ☆.  Poison Dragon

desc: Attack one row of enemy and cause 300% to 600% physical damage. Cause 600% damage to the target whose HP is lower than 30%, and stun the target for 1 round
name: ☆.  Six King Pistol

desc: Chance to cause 4*target's Max HP none-attribute damage. If the effect is not triggered,the target will restore HP by 50% of his/her max HP. Skill success rate raises with the crew wit
name: Death Trap

desc: Attack the target with the lowest HP to deal him/her as many damage as 20% of max HP in the enemies. The damage rate raises with the crew agility. And make the target bleeding (can't restore) for 2 rounds
name: Supersonic Shooting

desc: Attack a single target and cause 400% of magical damage. The skill hit rate is based on the crew's rate. If the target is hit, the caster can restore 100 points fury. The damage raises with the crew wit
name: Death's Roar

desc: Attack one row of enemy and cause 300% physical damage and strength *10 points extra damage. Stun the target for 1 round. If the target is under a stunning status, then it can cause 600% physical damage and strength *20 points damage to the target
name: Champion's Fury

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 200% physical damage and strength *10 points extra damage.Meanwhile, reduce all enemy targets' fury by 35 points
name: U. Destruction Cannon

desc: Increases 50% of physical and magical attack of all allies. Effect lasts 2 turns. The skill will also restore HP which equals to 13% of current magical attack to all allies. Skill effect rises according to caster's wit.
name: Holy Blessing

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 200% magical damage. And clear debuff effects for all your members. Meanwhile, restore all your members' fury by 30 points, but caster's fury will not be increased. The restored fury points raises with the crew wit
name: Magic Wing

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 300% physical damage, and reduce the target's physical defence by 50% and break his/her block. Lasts for 2 rounds
name: U. A Flash

desc: Raise your critical hit by 50%. Attack one row of enemy and cause 200%, 400% and 600% physical damage to the target separately
name: Bombing Swan

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 250% magical damage. And there is a greater chance to burn the target for 2 rounds
name: Lord Flame·Boom

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 200% magical damage, and petrify enemy for 1 round. Increase the petrified target's physical and magical defence by 50%
name: Slave Arrow

desc: Attack one row of enemy and cause 300% physical damage. If the target is under buff or debuff status, then the target will receive extra damage which is as many as 20% of his/her max HP. Meanwhile, clear the target's buff or debuff
name: Fist of Faith

desc: Raise yourself 1.5% defense. One Skill Level up increases defense by 1.5%.
name: Holy Guard

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 200% magical damage.And there's a certain chance to stun the target for 1 round and reduce the target's magical and physical defence by 30% for 2 rounds. Meanwhile, raise your magical attack by 50% for 2 rounds
name: Dark Tunnel

desc: Attack a single target and cause 600% physical damage and reduce 75% of the target's physical defence for 2 rounds
name: Spiral White Blade

desc: Raise your side overall physical and magical attack by 50%, lasts for 2 rounds. And clear debuff effects for all your members
name: Shadow Revolution

desc: Effective when crew dies. Increase all your member's block rate by 30% and dodge rate by 30%, lasting 2 rounds. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Wind Blade 7

desc: Effective when crew dies. Increase all your member's block rate by 25% and dodge rate by 20%, lasting 2 rounds. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Wind Blade 6

desc: Effective when crew dies. Increase all your member's block rate by 20% and dodge rate by 10%, lasting 2 rounds. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Wind Blade 5

desc: Effective when crew dies. Increase all your member's block rate by 15%, lasting 2 rounds. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Wind Blade 4

desc: Effective when crew dies. Increase all your member's block rate by 10%, lasting 2 rounds. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Wind Blade 3

desc: Effective when crew dies. Increase all your member's block rate by 6%, lasting 2 rounds. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Wind Blade 2

desc: Effective when crew dies.  Increase all your member's block rate by 2%, lasting 2 rounds. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.

desc: Deals 150% physical damage, increases caster's dodge by 200 ponts for one round.

desc: Attacks random enemy targets a total of 10 times, with damage based on your agility. Also increases your dodge by 50% for 1 round.

desc: There's a certain odds of attaching toxic effect in the attack. Success rate of poison increases with Skill Level.
name: Poison Shoot

desc: Reduces caster's Hit by 200 points, deals 200% physical damage.
name: Rapid Shot

desc: Disappear into the shadows to increase your dodge rate for 1 turn. Effect increases with skill level.
name: Dark Shadow

desc: Attacks all enemies and inflicts 100% magical damage with certain chances to stun enemies. The percentage of damage increases according to caster's wit.

desc: There's a certain odds of absorbing HP in the attack. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Hell Shot

desc: Raise your critical hit when attacking the target. The effect raises with Skill Level.
name: Fast Block

desc: Attack and stun the target. The duration increases with Skill Level.
name: Concussion Shot

desc: Poison a single target of the enemies. The duration increases with Skill Level.
name: Hidden Poison

desc: Make normal attack deal twice damage and raise yourself 0.2% dodge rate when releasing the skill. One Skill Level up increases dodge rate by 0.2%. Dodge rate can be stacked until the end of the battle. Skill release rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Moonwalk

desc: Invoke body instincts on the verge of death to largely raise critical hit rate. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Berserk

desc: When your HP is lower than 30%, it will raise your physical attack by (strength *0.5* skill level) points
name: Blood Surge

desc: Increase caster's Critical Hit rate by 1%. Critical Hit will rise 1% with every level up
name: Fiery Blessing

desc: Raise yourself 0.8% Magical Attack when releasing the skill. One Skill Level up raises magical attack by 0.8%. The effect can be stacked and last until the end of battle. Skill release rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Flame Power

desc: Raise your dodge by 1%, effect lasts for 2 rounds. One Skill Level up increases 1% dodge
name: Gale

desc: Raise critical hit every two rounds. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Blazing Fury

desc: Invoke strong will on the verge of death to raise your attack. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Strong Will

desc: Attack the target with lowest magical defence to deal 400% magical damage, and transfer the damage and 20% of the target's max HP to restore your members' HP. Damage rate raises with the crew wit
name: Heart Shock

desc: Attack current target and all enemies on a row and a line of that target and cause 200% magical damage. And make the target negative and reduce the target's hit rate by 50%. The effect will last for 2 rounds. Damage rate raises with the crew's wit
name: Ghost Split

desc: Attack the target with the lowest defence to cause 800% physical damage to the target. And deal extra damage according to the crew strength and agility.The target stun for 1 round.
name: String Cut

desc: Attack the target with highest fury to deal 500% physical damage and additional Fury*300 none-attribute damage at the end of the attack. The target's fury will be cleared to 0. Meanwhile, make the target Negative for 2 rounds
name: Secret Technique. Buraikan

desc: Heal your allies, restore 15% of the max HP in your allies and randomly raises a crew's fury by 100. HP restoration rate increases with the crew wit
name: Rain of Flowers

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 300% physical damage.And clear the target's buff status. Meanwhile, there is a certain chance to stun the target for 1 round. Stun rate raises with the crew strength
name: Ursus Shock

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 200% magical damage, inflicting extra damage according to crew's Wisdom, reducing targets' Physical Attack by 100%, lasts for 1 round
name: Magnetic Storm

desc: Heals an ally of the lowest HP with HP which equals 200% of caster's magic attack, releases a voodoo doll to the target so that the target will be protected from any types of harm in 1 turn and reflects 20% of damage to the opponents. The reflected damage will increase with the crew's constitution.
name: Demon Face

desc: Deals 500% physical damage to an opponent, has additional damage according to the crew's Strength, reduces target's Fury by 50 points, has a chance to release the skill again. The probability of chain kill increases as crew's Agility rises.
name: X Chain Kill

desc: Attacks opponent who has the highest Fury, deals damage which equals 400% plus 50% of caster's speed, absorbs up to 25 Fury from the target, stuns the target for 1 turn. The amount of absorbed Fury will increase as caster's Wit rises.

desc: Reduce your HP by 50% to cause 500% physical damage plus 1.5 times of your reduced HP to a single target of the enemy

desc: Attacks all enemies, deals Strength*20*200% physical damage. The amount of damage will double if enemy’s HP is less than 30%. Target’s Fury reduces by 25 points with a chance of being stunned for 1 round.

desc: Restores 20% of Max HP and remove all debuffs to all allies, reduce magic damage taken by 25% in 2 rounds. Healing effect increases as crew’s  Wisdom rises, damage mitigation rate increases as crew’s constitution increases(50% at most)

desc: Attacks all enemies to inflict 200% physical damage and chances to slumber the targets (immobilizes the targets. The effect will remove once the targets receive damage but the damage will increase by 50%) for 2 rounds. The damage percentage increases with the crew strength.
name: Fantasia

desc: Attack single enemy target and cause 150% magical damage. Target's hit rate, dodge rate and speed will decrease by 50%, lasting for 2 rounds.
name: Slowmo Photons

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 150% magical damage, skill critical rate equals player's own critical rate. Restore 50 fury after attack, damage increases with wisdom.
name: Thunder Rod

desc: Inflicts 400% physical damage to a random target, deals additional damage according to crew's Agility and causes the target to burn, lasting 2 rounds. Each round inflicts 200 damage and restores 1 Fury. Fury cannot exceed 300 points.
name: Firebird Star

desc: Attacks the enemy target with the lowest magic defense to inflict 300% magic damage and turns the additional damage (=10% of the enemy target’s HP) into HP to restore all your wounded crews. The damage percentage increases with the crew wit.
name: Operating Room

desc: Attacks the target with the highest fury for 300% physical damage plus an additional (fury*200) non-attribute damage. The target's fury is also reduced to 0.
name: Shark Fist

desc: Attack one row of enemy and cause 150% damage. Targets will become negtive (cannot accumulate fury) and their hit rate is down by 50%, lasting for two rounds, damage is calculated based on attacker's wisdom.
name: Ghost Network

desc: Attack all enemy targets and cause 100% physical damage, reducing targets' physical and magical attack by 30%, lasting for 2 rounds.
name: Wolves Dance

desc: Attack single enemy target and cause 400% physical damage, reducing target's physical defense by 50%, lasting for 2 rounds.
name: Gekirin

desc: Deals 200% physical damage to all enemies, reduces target’s physical and magic attack by 50% for 2 turns with a chance of debuff for 1 turn. The percentage of damage will rise according to crew’s Strength and Agility
name: Meteor Volcano

desc: Attack single enemy target and cause 400% magical damage with 80% chance to silence the target for 2 rounds
name: Golden Bubbles

desc: Attack one row of enemy and cause 200% physical damage, extra damage calculated based on players' strength and dexterity. Targets' fury is absorbed at maximum 50.
name: Devil Wind Leg

desc: Attack the enemy target with lowest physical defense and cause 800% damage plus 30% of the character's total damage taken, extra damage is calculated based on player's strength.

desc: Create a protective shield, absorbing maximum damage of 20000 + character's constitution*20, lasting for 2 rounds.

desc: Attacks all enemies to inflict 300% magic damage and chances to freeze the targets(who will be immobilized ,lose Dodge, and may die when being attacked) for 1 round. The damage percentage increases with the crew wit.

desc: Deals 120% physical damage to enemies in a column while burning them, causing them to lose 10% of their maximum HP each turn for 2 turns.

desc: Deals 80% magic damage to all enemies with a random chance of stunning them for 1 turn, poisoning them for 2 turns, silencing them for 2 turns, or reducing their defense by 50% for 2 turns.

desc: Deals 100% magic damage to all enemies with a chance of silencing them, making them unable to use skills for 1 turn.

desc: Attacks the target with the lowest HP for a maximum of 20% of their maximum HP. Damage increases with agility.

desc: Deals 300% magical damage to a single target and stuns them for 2 turns. The target will also have their defense reduced by 30% for 2 turns while your magical attack is increased by 50%.

desc: Deals 200% magical damage to all enemies. Targets also have a chance to be burned, losing 10% of their maximum HP each turn for 2 turns.

desc: Deals 200% physical damage to a single target. If that target has a buff/debuff, remove it while dealing extra damage (up to 20% of their maximum HP).

desc: Deals 250% physical damage to a single target and absorbs their fury (maximum of 50 points).

desc: Deals 200% physical damage to all enemies while reducing their fury by 25.

desc: Deals 500% physical damage to the enemy target with the lowest physical defense. Extra damage is done based on strength and agility.

desc: Chance to hit a single target for (your max HP * 2) non-attribute damage. If this skill misses, the target has their HP restored by that amount. Hit rate increases with int.

desc: Deals 300% physical damage to a single target and stuns them for 2 turns. If the target is already stunned, this skill deals 800% physical damage.

desc: Deals 300% magic damage to a single target. If the skill hits, you restore 100 fury. Damage increases with intelligence.

desc: Clears your team of debuffs and while restoring their fury by 30 (does not apply to caster). The amount of fury restored increases with intelligence.

desc: Deals 150% physical damage to a single target with a chance of stunning them for 3 turns. If the target is not stunned, the skill's user will instead be stunned for 3 turns.

desc: Attacks a single row of enemies for magical damage while silencing them, making them unable to use skills the next round.

desc: Attacks a single enemy for physical damage, with a chance to stun the target and reduce their physical and magical defense for 1 turn.

desc: Attacks a single enemy with 200% physical damage. Healing himself with 50% damage.

desc: Attacks enemies in a single column for 200% physical damage,damage increases after each enemy hit.

desc: Deals damage to all enemies, with a chance of stunning them for 1 turn. While stunned, targets have their physical and magical defense increased by 50%.

desc: Deals 200% physical damage to all enemies while reducing their physical defense by 20% for 2 turns.

desc: Deals 300% to 600% physical damage to a single target. Cchance to stun the target for 1 turn.

desc: Increases the physical attack and magical attack of your team by 30%. Lasts 2 turns.

desc: Deals 120% physical damage to all enemies. Damage is doubled against targets with very low HP.

desc: Attacks a target for 80% non-attribute damage, as well as stunning them for 2 turns.

desc: Deals 150% magical damage to all enemies. Medium hit rate.

desc: Deals physical damage to single target,chance to attack twice.

desc: Increase Max HP by 20%; a certain chance to avoid physical damage

desc: Fury +25 to a random member of your side in the normal attack; Chances to clear all your negative statuses before the round starts

desc2: One of the ancient weapons -Poseidon, has the power of communicating with and commanding Sea Kings

desc: Restores Fury +15 when damaged; Chances to clear all your negative status before the round starts

desc2: Haki is human's potential power that people are born with.

desc: Wisdom +5%; Chances to deal Wisdom*10 none-attribute damage in the normal attack;
name: Magnet Fruit

desc2: Allows the user to transform into theropoda dinosaur of terrifying power.

desc: Speed +20%; Chances not to be damaged when you're attacked
name: Glint-Glint Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to move as fast as the light , emit lights from the fingertips, which can even blind the enemies temporarily and  compress light particles to emit light.

desc: Chances to stun the attackers for 1 round when you're attacked; 100% deals 3x damage to a stunned target in the normal attack
name: Magma-Magma Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to transform himself/herself into magma that can melt ice as large as the giant with just one blow

desc: Physical Attack +10%; Chances to deal a target 2x damage in the normal attack
name: Ox-Ox Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to fold the long neck. The big body can boost the destructive power. The hybrid is as huge as the beast.

desc: Chances to freeze the attacker for 1 round when you're attacked; 100% deals 4x damage to a frozen target in the normal attack
name: Ice-Ice Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to freeze everything he/she touches. The people or creature frozen will look like dead and their bodies become crisp. A tiny blow will lead to their death.

desc: 100% hits a target in the normal attack
name: Slow-Slow Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to emit slowing photons to slow people or objects within 30 seconds

desc: Physical Damage received -30%; Chances to damage a row of enemies in the normal attack
name: Hollow-Hollow Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to randomly generate a hollow to frustrate the people who are penetrated by the hollow

desc: Magical Attack +10%; Chances to reduce a target's Magical Defense by 50% for 1 round
name: Surgery Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to create a space where human and objects can be randomly cut, exchanged, and spliced. The people who are cut won't die or get hurt.

desc: Critical Hit Damage +100%; Chances to stun a target for 1 round in the normal attack
name: Imitation Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to be anyone that his/her right hand touches and back to himself/herself by touching the face with the left hand. The user can't attack while transforming

desc: Chances to silence a target for 1 round in the normal attack
name: Wax-Wax Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to transform his/her body into any shape and produce wax mucus, gaining the hardness after concretion

desc: Chances to reflect normal attack damage to a target once when you're damaged
name: Counterstrike
desc2: Kohza's weapon is a big long sword. When Kohza is attacked, he can use it to withstand and fight back

desc: Physical Defense +50%; Chances to damage a row of enemies in the normal attack
name: Dice-Dice Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to transform any body part into a blade, thus gaining the hardness of metal

desc: Magical Attack +10%; Chances not to be damaged when you're attacked
name: Smoke-Smoke Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to turn any part of the body into smoke. The white smoke created can touch objects or trap the enemies

desc: Your Physical Attack +50% when your HP is 30% lower
name: Ox-Ox Fruit -Bison Mode
desc2: Makes the user sturdy and as fast as a bison

desc: Physical & Magical Defense +50%
name: Man Ape
desc2: Looking like a monkey, but in fact it's human. Besides the amazing vital capacity, it can knock down Sea Kings with a fist

desc: Chances to damage the enemies in the cross-shaped range in the normal attack
name: Boom-Boom Fruit
desc2: Any part of the ability users can explode, including the booger and breath. Nothing will happen if they eat the bombs

desc: Dodge +20%; Chance not to be damaged when you're attacked
name: Slip-Slip Fruit
desc2: All objects the user's skin touches will slide away. The user moves fast with the smooth skin when in bare feet

desc: Physical Attack +10%; Chances to 100% turn the Damage to your HP in the normal attack
name: Bloodlust
desc2: Arlong has a saw-shaped nose, regenerative teeth and hard jaw. As a saw-shark Fishman, he is lust for the blood

desc: Physical Attack +10%; Block +15%
name: kendo
desc2: Ichitoryu swordsman, is skilled in swordsmanship, swearing to collect all famous blades from the evil people

desc: Chances to absorb extra 10% of a target's Max HP in the normal attack
name: Munch-Munch Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to use the function of whatever he/she swallows. He/she can even swallow himself/herself

desc: Physical Damage received -30%; Chances to absorb extra 10% of a target's Max HP in the normal attack
name: Sand-Sand Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to turn the body into sand that will piled into the blade to attack, absorb the water of any creature or object he/she touches with the right hand and create the sandstorm

desc: Constitution +5%; Chances to clear all your negative statuses before the attack each round
name: Nobleness
desc2: Vivi, princess of Alabasta, is an elegant noble who has a reputation in the country and is loved by the people.

desc: Critical Hit +20%; Chances to restore your Fury +25 in Critical Hit
name: Rumble-Rumble Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to move at a lightening speed and release the electricity to stimulate thunderclouds' electrode to thunder in a specific area. The highest voltage can be 200 million

desc: Chances to burn a target for 1 round in the normal attack
name: Heat-Heat Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to change his/her temperature from 1℃ to 10000℃, making him/her intact in the lava

desc: Constitution +5%; All damage received -30% when HP is 30% lower
name: Malinger
desc2: Doc Q, nicknamed "God of Death", is the Blackbeard Pirates' Doctor and always get others' compassion by pretending sickness

desc: Magical Attack +10%; Chances to increase your Critical Hit by 5% each time you're damaged. Effect stacks till the end of the battle.
name: Negotiation
desc2: Lafitte is responsible for the negotiation in the Blackbeard Pirates. He once showed up in the Shichibukai conference, demanding them to let Captain Blackbeard join Shichibukai

desc: Effective when crew dies. To each single target, there's a 15% chance to stun the enemy 1 round. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Undercurrent 1

desc: Physical Attack +10%; Chances to damage a row of enemies in the normal attack
name: String Cloud
desc2: String Cloud is tiny yet firm. Whoever gets entangled will be immobilized

desc: Effective when crew dies. To each single target, there's a 30% chance to stun the enemy 1 round. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Undercurrent 2

desc: Magical Defense +50%; Deals 2x damage in the normal attack if a target is with negative status
name: Surprise Cloud
desc2: There're various traps in the Surprise Cloud. Anyone that touches a trap may get himself killed

desc: Effective when crew dies. To each single target, there's a 45% chance to stun the enemy 1 round. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Undercurrent 3

desc: Physical Defense +50%; Chances to deal a target 2x damage in the normal attack
name: Iron Cloud
desc2: Ohm has a "Cloud Shell" that can spray Iron Cloud. Equip it into the blade and the blade will become light, hard, and flexible

desc: Effective when crew dies. To each single target, there's a 60% chance to stun the enemy 1 round. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Undercurrent 4

desc: Magical Attack +10%; Chances to clear all enemies' positive statuses in the normal attack
name: Swamp-Swamp Fruit
desc2: Gedatsu puts Swamp Cloud into his area where anyone steps will end up dead

desc: Effective when crew dies. To each single target, there's a 75% chance to stun the enemy 1 round. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Undercurrent 5

desc: Speed +10%
name: Spring-Spring Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to turn any part of the body into a spring and use anywhere as the bounce point to attack

desc: Effective when crew dies. Clear debuff of all your members. To each single target, there's a 90% chance to stun the enemy 1 round. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Undercurrent 6

desc: Max HP +20%; Chances to restore 10% Max HP when you're attacked
name: Faith
desc2: Cricket, descendant of Noland who is deemed as a liar, believes that Sky Island really exists and devotes his life to fighting the fate

desc: Effective when crew dies. Clear debuff of all your members.  100% chance to stun all enemies 2 rounds. Skill will not be launched when all crew are dead.
name: Undercurrent 7

desc: Chances to deal a target 2x damage and poison you for 2 rounds; Your Magical Attack +100% in the poisonous status
name: Venom-Venom Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to exhale poison gas, release toxic fluid from the body, or turn into "Toxic dragon" at the enemies

desc: Chances to reduce a target's Double Hit by 50% for 1 round in the normal attack; Chances not to be damaged when you're attacked
name: Shadow-Shadow Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to pull open and cut off others' shadows, turn the shadows robbed into the zombies by putting them into the bodies, and separate a shadow from themselves to be the substitute

desc: Physical Attack +10%; Chances to damage all enemies in the normal attack
name: Cat-Cat Fruit
desc2: Makes the user flexible, powerful and ferocious. The hybrid type is bigger than beast type

desc: Chances to clear all your negative statuses before the round; The damage received each time is up to 35% of your Max HP
name: Paw-Paw Fruit
desc2: Two palms, like cats' paw, can bounce off anything, including the air.

desc: Speed +20%; Chances to increase your Physical Attack by 10% in the normal attack. The effect stacks till the end of the battle
name: Line-Line Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to control more than 2 people's actions and cut human and objects with the invisible lines. It can't control people's mind.

desc: Chances to restore your Fury +25 when you're damaged; 50% chance to stun a target for 1 round in the normal attack
name: Fishman Water Art
desc2: Allows the user to extract liquid substances and makes him/her powerful in the water

desc: Hit +20%; Chances to increase your Block Break by 5% in the normal attack. The effect stacks till the end of the battle.
name: Precision
desc2: Van Augur, nicknamed "The Supersonic", has an incredible sniping ability and sniped flying seagulls from a great distance on a roof in the Mock Town

desc: Strength +5%; Chances to deal a target extra Your Strength*10 none-attribute damage in the normal attack
name: Great Strength
desc2: Burgess, nicknamed "Champion", is a tall man that has an incredible physical strength. He can lift a house with great ease

desc: A certain chance to make the attacker negative 1 round when you receive damage. When your HP is lower than 30%, your physical attack will increase by 50%
name: Sniper King
desc2: With the mask, Usopp gains great courage and 100% hit rate.

desc: Raise your agility by 5%, and reduce the target's fury by 25 points on  normal attack
name: Black Leg Style
desc2: Sanji attacks with his feet, power measured by tons. He is a fast and heavy kicker, and is called Black Leg by the Marines.

desc: A certain chance to clear all your debuffs before the next round. And a chance to raise your physical attack by 5% when you receive damage.The effect can be stacked and will last to the end of the battle
name: Three-Sword Style
desc2: Zoro is a swordsman of great composure and tough will, extreme situations will inspire his potential.

desc: A certain chance to petrify the target for 1 round. Attack the petrified target, the attacker will receive wit*10 non-attribute damage
name: Love-Love Fruit
desc2: Only works on the ones that get seduced, will turn them into stones.

desc: Attack all enemies.
name: Razor the Raksha

desc: Physical Damage received -30%; Chances to restore your Fury +25 when you're damaged
name: Metal Remake
desc2: As a cyborg, Franky hides a number of weapons in the body and is immune to any bullet and cannon

desc: Deals 100% physical damage, reduces caster's damage taken by 50% for 2 rounds.
name: Shield Of Guard

desc: Wisdom +5%; Chances to stun a target for 1 round in the normal attack
name: Human-Human Fruit
desc2: Rare devil fruit. If people eat it, they'll be ducks but if the animals eat it, they'll understand the human language

desc: Raise your wit by 5%. Random target of your ally will restore fury by 25
name: Hana Hana Fruit
desc2: Flower will blossom at any part of the user who will be able to turn into many forms

desc: Reduce your received magical damage by 30%. When your HP is lower than 30%, your critical hit will increase by 100%
name: Art of Weather
desc2: Nami feels the air to predict the weather, she knows the currents in the air and attacks with her rod.

desc: Raise your wit by 10% and a certain chance to cause wit*10 damage
name: Will
desc2: Navigators hold the most firm belief, and are the most well-learned.

desc: Raise your agility by 10%, and a certain chance to deal damage to all enemy targets on  normal attack
name: Swift
desc2: Snipers are of the most agile kind, beyond the reach of enemies on the field, their polished sniping skill takes care of targets hundreds of yards away.

desc: Raise your strength by 10%, and a certain chance to stun the target on  normal attack for 1 round
name: Valiant
desc2: Great Swordsman excels in strength, and takes the responsibility to protect their teammates. They are someone that can be relied on at critical moment.

desc: Reduce your received magical damage by 30%. Reduce the target's fury by 25 on normal attack
name: Burning Fruit
desc2: The user can turn himself into fire, releasing skills like Fire Fist.Yet as in the form of fire, the user will not be able to stand the heat from lava.

desc: Raise your magical attack by 10%, and a certain chance to deal damage to all enemy targets on  normal attack
name: Dark Fruit
desc2: The most evil Devil Fruit ever, with dark gravity inside. The user will become darkness and suck in and crush everything that comes close.

desc: Raise your block by 20%. Raise your physical attack by 10% after each block. The effect can be stacked and will last to the end of the battle
name: Charge
desc2: Hawkeye can change bullet's track with his blade, and recognized as the "Greatest Swordsman".

desc: Raise your constitution by 10%. When your HP is lower than 30%, the received damage will reduce by 30%
name: Mood
desc2: Doctors are blessed by the sea, they can greatly reduce the damage when critical.

desc: Chances to deal a target extra Your Strength*5 none-attribute damage in the normal attack
name: Bash
desc2: Battle chief of Krieg Pirates Gin uses a tonfa tipped with heavy iron balls to attack in the combat

desc: Chances to deal a target 2x damage in the normal attack
name: Twin Blade
desc2: Kuro uses Cat Claws and can move fast, but he can't control the target he wants to attack because of the fast speed

desc: Chances to deal 2x damage in the normal attack
name: Cat Brothers
desc2: Be timid to deceive the enemies and attack with the sharp nails. The user is expert in stealing the enemies' weapons

desc: Chances to slumber a target for 1 round in the normal attack
name: Hypnotist
desc2: Hypnotist Jango with heart-shaped eyeglasses, uses a fretsaw as the hypnosis item and murmurs One, Two, Jango to perform the hypnosis

desc: Physical Attack +10%
name: Rokutoryu
desc2: Hachi, who regards Rokutoryu as the best skill in the world, can attack with six swords

desc: Chances to stun a target for 1 round in the normal attack
name: Fishman  Karate
desc2: Karate uses the powerful impact and destructive force to instantly take down the enemies. Fishman is muscular than the mankind, so its strength is better than the mankind

desc: Your Magical Attack +50% when HP is 30% lower
name: Blood Manic
desc2: Wrapped up with all sizes of shields, he thinks his defense is the best and never drops a blood in the combat, but once he finds himself shedding blood, he'll lose the control

desc: Physical & Magical Defense +50%; Chances to stun a target for 1 round in the normal attack
name: Overlord
desc2: Krieg has a great power that average person can't compare with. Also, he's equipped with the iron armor, diamond fists, pricker armor, gas bomb and other weapons

desc: Max HP +20%
name: Sturdiness
desc2: Alvida was a fat woman before eating the Slip-Slip Fruit. The strong body can make her easily wield the huge iron stick

desc: Physical Attack +10%
name: Bully
desc2: Son of the marine officer Morgan, is bullying around in the town by using his father's rank

desc: Constitution +5%; Chances to restore 20% of Max HP each time you're attacked when your HP is 30% lower
name: Revive-Revive Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to revive once and tie part of the soul to the sword to freeze everything

desc: Physical & Magical Defense +50%
name: Guard
desc2: Improves the defense

desc: Physical Attack +10%
name: Beast Taming
desc2: Mohji, who claims there's no animal he can't control, always rides his beloved Lion Richi and controls the beast to attack

desc: Dodge +20%;Your Physical Attack +5% after each Dodge. Effect stacks till the end of the battle
name: Chop-Chop Fruit
desc2: Allows the user to split himself/herself and control each part to fly at the enemies except the feet. If the feet is off the ground, other parts can't fly

desc: Chances to 100% turn Damage into your HP in the normal attack
name: Brutality
desc2: Axe-Hand Morgan is cruel. Corrupted by the power, he does whatever he wants in Shells Town

desc: Chances to deal 1.5x damage in the normal attack
name: Acrobatics
desc2: Buggy uses the swordsmanship on a monocycle. He's not a good swordsman, but excels at using small props to perform stunts

desc: Invoke strong will to raise attack on the verge of death. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Momentum

desc: Raise overall hit rate of your side. Effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Hit Sear

desc: There's a certain odds of recovering your HP at the end of each round. Recovery effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Regeneration

desc: Aura skill. Raise your side overall critical hit rate by 1%. One Skill Level up increases 1% critical hit
name: Burst Assault

desc: There's a certain odds of launching one extra normal attack to next target after killing one enemy. Skill release rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Fast Chase

desc: Invoke potential instincts on the verge of death to greatly raise dodge rate. The effect.
name: Will To Live

desc: Raise yourself 5% hit when releasing the skill. One Skill Level up increases hit rate by 5%. Skill release rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Mind Focus

desc: Invoke the will to live on the verge of death to greatly raise the speed. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Swift

desc: Raise your speed by (agility *0.15* skill level) points
name: Rapid Outburst

desc: There's a certain odds of clearing yourself 1 debuff at the start of the round. Skill release rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Shelter Of God

desc: Poison all members of enemies. The success rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Toxic Space

desc: Raise attack when debuff occurs. Raised attack increases with Skill Level.
name: Heat UP

desc: There's a certain odds of bouncing damage to the attacker when being attacked. The damage increases with Skill Level.
name: Armor Pierce

desc: Raise yourself 1% Speed in the battle. One Skill Level up raises Speed by 1%.
name: Speed Control

desc: There's a certain odds of recovering your HP at the end of each round. Recovery effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Self-Recovery

desc: Invoke body instincts on the verge of death to greatly raise critical hit rate. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Awake Potential

desc: There's a certain odds of attaching one extra damage when critical hit appears in the attack. Attached damage increases with Skill Level.
name: Tactics

desc: Attack and cleanse all enemies. Damage increases with Skill Level.
name: Fallen Meteorite

desc: Burn all enemies. The success rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Flaming Breath

desc: Reduce Speed of all enemies. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Snowstorm

desc: Deals 150% magical damage and makes the enemy slumber for one round.
name: Frost the World

desc: Deals 100% magical damage, 60% chance to petrify the enemy for one round.
name: Medusa's Eye

desc: There's a certain odds of absorbing HP in the attack. The Effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Goblin Illusion

desc: Attack all enemies. The damage increases with Skill Level.
name: Heavy Rain

desc: Attack a single target of the enemy, dealing 200% physical damage. There's a certain odds of doubling the damage.
name: Rubber Bazooka

desc: Attack all enemies, dealing 120% physical damage. e.g., If HP of the target is too low, then the damage will be doubled.
name: 3000 Worlds

desc: Raise your block rate by 1%.The effect will Last for 2 rounds. One Skill Level up increases 1% block.
name: Warlord's Power

desc: Recover HP and raise defense after dealing damage to enemy. Effect will last until the end of the battle. The effects increase with Skill Level.
name: Iron Body

desc: Raise your hit rate by 2% when releasing the skill. One Skill Level up will increase hit rate by 2%. Skill rate can be stacked and last until the end of battle. Skill release rate increases Skill Level.
name: Water Arts

desc: Raise your physical defense by (strength *0.5* skill level) points
name: Stout

desc: Swordman enters defense status at full blast to reduce physical damage in the round after launching the skill. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Great Shield

desc: Inspire strong will and raise defense on the verge of death. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Unyielding

desc: There's a chance to reflect 24% damage whenreceiving physical or magical attack. Damage + 4% for every skill level up.
name: Mirror Soul

desc: There's a certain odds of inspiring stronger HP on the verge of death. HP will recover once you are damaged. Recovery effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Immortality

desc: Raise your maximum HP by (constitution point *2* skill level) points
name: Grand Power

desc: 每次自身受到的所有类型伤害最高只为自身最大体力值的10%
name: 石化皮肤

desc: 反弹伤害
name: 稻草人

desc: There's a certain odds of recovering your HP at the end of each round. Recovery effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Fast Healing

desc: Heal all members of your side to 400 points of HP. One Skill Level up increases healing amount by 100 points. Crew wisdom can improve healing effect.
name: Group Healing

desc: Transfer 50% of your physical defense into 60% physical attack， the effect will last for 2 rounds.One Skill Level up increases 10% physical attack
name: Rampage

desc: Clear one buff from a random single target of the enemy. The success rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Purification

desc: Raise your dodge rate when releasing the skill. Dodge rate can be stacked and last until the end of battle. Effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Paper Arts

desc: Create a holy shield for a random single target of your side to protect him from being effected by magic. The duration increases with Skill Level.
name: Holy Shield

desc: Raise overall defense of your side when releasing the skill. Effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Barrier of Earth

desc: Raise attack of your crew on the rows. The effect  increases with Skill Level.
name: Spirit Incentive

desc: Poison all enemies. The success rate  increases with Skill Level.
name: Hell Swamp

desc: Heals the crew with the lowest HP. The amount of healed HP equal to 1000+20% of caster's magical attack.
name: Emergency Heal

desc: Deals 150% magical damage and poison the enemy for 2 rounds
name: Death Temptation

desc: There's a certain odds of recovering 11% of your maximum HP at the end of each round. One Skill Level up increase recovery HP by 1%. Skill release rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Inspiration

desc: Enter protection status to reduce the damage after releasing. The duration and effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Firm Armor Guard

desc: Invoke potential instincts on the verge of death to greatly raise dodge rate. The effect increases with the Skill Level.
name: Mood

desc: Raise your magical defense by (wit *0.5* skill level) points
name: Focus

desc: There's a certain odds of launching normal attack to the damage source upon being attacked and give yourself recovery status for 2 rounds. Skill release rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Holy Counter

desc: There's a certain odds of clearing one debuff from yourself at the start of the round. The success rate increases with Skill Level.
name: Shelter

desc: Raise yourself dodge rate. Effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Speedy Dodge

desc: Raise the attack when you find yourself in debuff effect. The attack   increases with Skill Level.
name: Focus Mind

desc: There's a certain odds of bouncing damage to damage source when being attacked. The bounced damage increases with Skill Level.
name: Reflection

desc: Inspire strong will and raise defense on the verge of death. The effect increases with Skill Level.
name: Soul Overdraw

desc: Aura skill. Raise overall speed of your side by 50 points in the battle. One Skill Level up increases speed by 50 points.
name: Wind Wing

desc: Aura skill. Raise overall dodge of your side by 1% in the battle. One Skill Level up increases dodge by 1%.
name: Wind Shuttle
